metadata.description: Kanban board for Real-Time Inventory Synchronization System. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Real-Time Inventory Synchronization System
tasks.description: Implement real-time inventory synchronization across all locations using cloud-based architecture with conflict resolution.
tasks.userStory: As a multi-location store owner, I want inventory changes to sync in real-time across all locations so that I can prevent overselling and have accurate inventory visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Given inventory is updated at Location A, when the change is saved, then all other locations see the updated inventory within 5 seconds
Given two users update the same item simultaneously, when both changes occur, then conflict resolution is applied (last-write-wins with conflict detection)
Given inventory sync fails temporarily, when connection is restored, then pending changes are automatically synced
Given a user views inventory, when they access the inventory page, then they see real-time data from all locations
Given sync occurs, when inventory changes, then all connected clients receive updates via real-time mechanism (SignalR/WebSockets)
Given sync performance, when 100+ concurrent updates occur, then system handles them without data loss or corruption
tasks.businessValue: Prevents overselling, enables accurate inventory visibility, and supports efficient multi-location operations.
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Azure SignalR for real-time updates. Implement optimistic concurrency control. Use database triggers or change tracking for inventory updates. Handle network partitions gracefully.
successMetrics: Sync latency: 95%+ of updates sync within 5 seconds
Conflict resolution: 100% of conflicts resolved without data loss
businessRules: Inventory updates must sync within 5 seconds
Last-write-wins conflict resolution with conflict detection alerts
Sync failures trigger retry with exponential backoff
Real-time updates only sent to users with appropriate permissions
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
